FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Temporary Intervention Fade as ECB Hawkishness Dominates
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY regains post-intervention footing as ECB signals June rate hike amid geopolitical tensions.
FX.comment: ECB hawkishness and geopolitical tensions favor USD despite Japanese intervention

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] FLAT: Geopolitical Risks Counterbalance AI-Driven Tech Momentum
tldr_points: Iran geopolitical risk pressures futures; crypto-linked equities rally on Bitcoin surge
Tech sector strength from AI narrative collides with macro uncertainty
Technical picture suggests consolidation; await clear break of current range
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 faces dual forces: geopolitical escalation vs. AI/crypto momentum. Range-bound near-term.
STOCKS.comment: Conflicting geopolitical and crypto catalysts produce neutral bias; await range resolution

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at Psychological $80k as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Bitcoin breaches $80k psychological resistance, signaling bullish momentum.
Kraken's Bitnomial acquisition expands US crypto derivatives access, boosting institutional demand.
Saylor's pause on BTC purchases introduces short-term caution but longer-term accumulation outlook remains intact.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD breaks $80k resistance amid derivative inflows; bias upward with defined entry, TP, SL levels.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC/USD breached $80k resistance with bullish order flow and supportive derivatives news; upward bias remains intact.
